article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.5. CA - IT Ticketing Software Lincenses 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $581K ServiceNow IT ticketing software licence renewal
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on awarding a contract worth roughly $581,000 (including taxes) to ServiceNow, Inc. to renew the City's internal IT ticketing software licences from March 2026 to March 2029.
briefs.action_required: No action needed — this is an internal City IT contract with no direct impact on local businesses.

key_dates.label: Burnaby ServiceNow IT licence contract start date
